name: Greaterhosen
description: Notes While this armor imposes a somewhat harsh -7 DEX penalty, it compensates with a huge +15 ATT buff. It also provides a solid +15 DEF & a good +8 VIT bonus. This armor works well with weapons that have high base damage & a low rate of fire, such as the Doom Bow, Clockwork Repeater, Dirk of Cronus & Valor. It does have a small negative reactive proc in the form of Hallucinating for 1.5 seconds upon hit at a 5% chance, but this effect has a 20 second cooldown, so the Hallucinating effect is negligible.
effects: On taking damage: 5% chance to gain Hallucinating for 1.5 seconds. Cooldown: 20 seconds
